replies.msg: 所以上電視好緊要，日本年輕人仲係成日睇電視。

My friend Fred practises his songs seven hours a day in pursuit of gaining a distinction in his graded exam. He's single-minded in his pursuit of his goal. I've never met anyone so ambitious and single-minded. A bassoonist with whom Fred is rehearsing is also very single-minded and dedicated in pursuit of studying a degree course at a conservatory. They both have something in common which is the single-minded pursuit of their goals. A friend of mine Tony is planning on starting a TV network. He's already fired up and ruthless and dedicated in pursuit of profit. He wants to have one channel dedicated to basketball and another channel dedicated to combat sports. He's devoted to making it the best dedicated sports network in the world.

replies.msg: 幾句。佢老公係龜田誠治配，佢個仔係中川大志配

I saw her live at Saitama Super Arena with my friends twice which was absolutely incredible and unforgettable. I remember we were late. I said "look at the time. The concert will have begun" It was quarter to seven. The concert would've started by then. It was a worthwhile concert that was compelling enough to see again. She's been strutting her stuff since she was a kid so don't sell her short. At the end of the last encore she bowed onstage soaking up the applause. She met with a standing ovation and thunderous ovation. She and the dancers and acrobats who were invited to perform alongside the singer gave a superb performance. The choreography, the stage and lighting design and the light sticks were magnificent and beyond all expectations. She's very career-oriented. My friend Joe is planning on having her endorse his company's products but he'll have to make it financially worthwhile for her. The singer has a worthwhile career. I regard music performing as a worthwhile job.
Happy New Year!!!

Her song "Rust" has been greeted work international critical acclaim in the press such as Japan times online, japan today, the japan news and various cultural websites. By the way this morning a single-decker bus which has passengers in it along with the cars behind the bus were stuck on Lyndhurst Terrace because a truck is parked in the middle of the road delivering orchids to the florist's but the driver had disappeared. Noone knew where the truck driver had gone. The single-deck bus and the cars behind it had been honking their horns along the way which was hilarious. After twenty minutes the lorry driver had returned and the traffic was finally moving again.

電氣廊

女士專用真無綫

日本AVIOT開發真無綫耳筒真的不遺餘力，即將於3月推出的TE-D01i更是專為女士而設的機款，先是耳筒針對亞洲女性耳朵做得比較小，機面印有花奔圖案，且可以自行更換，而充電盒造型十足馬卡龍，就連包裝盒也找來漫畫家江口壽史設計，確實討人歡心，為加強宣傳，廠商特地找來歌手大原櫻子拍攝宣傳片。規格方面，耳筒用上6mm單元，支援藍牙5.0及aptX編碼，播歌時間達8小時。
售價：10,670日圓（約760港元）
#AVIOT #TE_D01i #TrueWireless #真無綫 #aptX #江口壽史 #大原櫻子 #Digiclubhk #電氣廊

日本AVIOT開發真無綫耳筒真的不遺餘力，即將於3月推出的TE-D01i更是專為女士而設的機款，先是耳筒針對亞洲女性耳朵做得比較小，機面印有花奔圖案，且可以自行更換，而充電盒造型十足馬卡龍，就連包裝盒也找來漫畫家江口壽史設計，確實討人歡心，為加強宣傳，廠商特地找來歌手大原櫻子拍攝宣傳片。規格方面，耳筒用上6mm單元，支援藍牙5.0及aptX編碼，播歌時間達8小時。
售價：10,670日圓（約760港元）
#AVIOT #TE_D01i #TrueWireless #真無綫 #aptX #江口壽史 #大原櫻子 #Digiclubhk #電氣廊

【最新發行】大原櫻子《花朵燦爛》2020.3.27 digital release!!
藝人名稱：大原櫻子
產品名稱：花朵燦爛
產品編號：GUTE238
發行日期：2020.3.27
digital only 數位限定發行
　
☆★ Single Review
笛聲飄揚 大原櫻子與友人玉置光合作
清幽和風新曲〈花朵燦爛〉數位限定發行
大原櫻子與自國、高中以來的親密好友玉置光合作，推出全新數位限定單曲〈花朵燦爛〉。被譽為日本篠笛演奏家新希望的玉置光 (玉置ひかり)，為大原櫻子普寫下這曲散發雅致清幽氣息的和風新曲，並親自吹奏篠笛，此外更邀請到日本箏演奏家石本薰 (石本かおり)、17絃古箏演奏家松井咲獻藝，加上AUN J Classic Orchestra的井上公平主掌的編曲與太鼓演奏，帶來完全別於最新專輯《Passion》緊抓當今流行潮樂的古典風情。
　

#大原櫻子 #玉置ひかり #花光る #花朵燦爛
